name: New York City
description: The city that never sleeps, offering world-class museums, iconic landmarks, Broadway shows, and diverse culinary experiences across five boroughs.

name: Paris
description: The City of Light enchants visitors with its stunning architecture, world-renowned art museums, exquisite cuisine, and romantic ambiance along the Seine.

name: Tokyo
description: A vibrant metropolis blending ultramodern technology with ancient traditions, offering extraordinary food, unique neighborhoods, and unforgettable cultural experiences.

name: London
description: A global cultural hub where centuries of history meet contemporary innovation, featuring royal palaces, world-class theater, iconic museums, and diverse neighborhoods.

name: Sydney
description: A stunning harbor city renowned for its iconic Opera House, world-famous beaches, vibrant food scene, and easy access to unique Australian wildlife experiences.
